---
title: "Resume"
---

## You can view or download my resume below:

[View my resume](files/resume.pdf){target="_blank"}

<<<<<<< HEAD
<iframe src="files/resume.pdf" width="100%" height="800">

</iframe>
=======
[Download my resume](files/resume.pdf)
>>>>>>> f3fb6fd26611649ff6f73a9f270c8cc5b63c7db2
